headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.

headline: Workday to Power Fairview Health AI Modernization: Stock to Gain?
summary: WDAY expands in healthcare tech with Fairview deal, using AI-powered platform to streamline HR, finance and supply chain for 34K employees.
